title: Software Engineer Intern — Folio3 Pakistan
content: Software Engineer Intern at Folio3 Pakistan (2025-06-10 to 2025-08-10). As a Software Engineer Intern at Folio3 Pakistan, I contributed to the development of SnapVault, a cutting-edge mobile application designed for private and seamless image distribution. My primary focus was on backend development, where I leveraged FastAPI to build secure and efficient APIs, manage data, and implement advanced logic, including computer vision techniques crucial for ensuring user privacy and optimizing image handling. I also worked on the frontend using React Native, enhancing the user experience and ensuring a smooth and intuitive interface for secure image sharing. Additionally, I gained hands-on experience with deployment on AWS EC2, ensuring scalability and reliability of the application.

title: BB Lounge - Premium Café Website — Overview
content: BB Lounge - Premium Café Website: A modern, responsive business website for BB Lounge in Dammam, Saudi Arabia, showcasing premium shisha flavors, café menu, event bookings, customer testimonials, gallery, and online reservation options with WhatsApp integration. BB Lounge is a premium café and shisha lounge website designed to provide customers with a seamless online experience while highlighting the lounge's modern atmosphere and services. The website features an elegant, mobile-friendly interface with dedicated sections for the gallery, complete food and beverage menu, premium shisha flavors, exclusive deals, customer testimonials, event bookings, business hours, location, and contact information. Links: live: https://bb-lounge.vercel.app/.

title: BB Lounge - Premium Café Website — Technical Details
content:
Technical details of BB Lounge - Premium Café Website (tech stack: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Vite, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Responsive Design, WhatsApp API, Google Maps Embed): 
The platform allows visitors to explore the lounge's offerings, reserve tables, and place orders directly through WhatsApp for a quick and convenient booking experience. Social media integration, Google Maps navigation, and an Instagram showcase help strengthen the brand's online presence while providing visitors with easy access to updates and directions.

title: SnapVault - AI-Powered Photo Distribution System
content: SnapVault - AI-Powered Photo Distribution System: Smart photo-sharing app using facial recognition for automatic tagging and secure group sharing Developed a cutting-edge mobile application for private and seamless image distribution using React Native and FastAPI. The system leverages facial recognition to automatically tag and group photos, enabling secure private sharing within groups for seamless collaboration. Backend developed with FastAPI for secure and efficient APIs, data management, and advanced logic including computer vision techniques crucial for ensuring user privacy and optimizing image handling.

title: Social Media Counter - Shopify App
content: Social Media Counter - Shopify App: Custom Shopify app displaying dynamic social media metrics integration Developed a custom Shopify app to display dynamic social media metrics. Integrated META APIs, Pinterest API, and YouTube API with sophisticated app-level logic. Focused on lightweight performance and seamless store integration for minimal impact on store loading times.

title: CrickVision — Overview
content: CrickVision: An AI-powered mobile cricket analysis platform that detects the cricket ball, tracks its trajectory, and estimates delivery speed using computer vision, making professional-grade analytics accessible to any player with a smartphone. CrickVision is a final year design project built to bridge the gap between expensive professional cricket analysis systems like Hawk-Eye and the everyday player. Using a custom-trained YOLOv10n object detection model, the system processes cricket delivery videos to detect the ball frame-by-frame, generate visual trajectory overlays, and calculate real-world ball speed. Links: live: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/18cDmDdQTLaTZuSuNc1PUvxhXQTITIaZE?usp=sharing; backendRepo: https://github.com/UsmanChaudhary115/CrickVision-Backend.git; frontendRepo: https://github.com/Rao-Mubashir/CrickNet_Fyp.git.

title: CrickVision — Technical Details
content:
Technical details of CrickVision (tech stack: React Native, Expo, JavaScript, FastAPI, Python, YOLOv10n, OpenCV, PyTorch, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Uvicorn, Axios, react-native-svg, expo-camera, expo-av, Google Colab): Players and coaches can record live deliveries or upload pre-recorded videos directly through the React Native mobile app. The backend, built with FastAPI and served via Uvicorn, handles all AI inference and video processing asynchronously for efficient performance. Results are visualized on-device using SVG overlays, and all analysis history is stored per user through Supabase.
The project was developed over 8 Agile Scrum sprints from October 2025 to May 2026, covering dataset collection (~40000 labeled frames), model training on Google Colab, backend development, frontend integration, and testing. CrickVision targets cricket academies, coaching centers, and individual players across South Asia as an affordable alternative to broadcast-grade analytics systems.

title: TrueCast - Online Election Management System
content: TrueCast - Online Election Management System: Secure election management platform with voter authentication and real-time results Developed a secure election management platform using ADO.NET and C#. The system features candidate registration, robust voter authentication, comprehensive election management tools, and real-time result computation with data integrity and security as paramount concerns. Links: live: https://truecast.runasp.net/; frontendRepo: https://github.com/UsmanChaudhary115/TrueCast_CleanArchitecture.git.
